features.name: nested interface instantiation (5 levels deep)
features.description: Code should include nested interface instantiation where one interface contains an instance of another interface, repeated across 5 levels of nesting

features.name: hierarchical interface member access through nested interfaces
features.description: Code should include hierarchical access to interface members through multiple levels of nested interfaces (accessing tif1.tif2.tif3.tif4.tif5.cnt pattern)

features.name: passing sub-interface via hierarchical path to module
features.description: Code should include a module that receives a sub-interface port where the actual argument is a hierarchical path into a nested interface (e.g., .tif3(tif1.tif2.tif3))

features.name: accessing deeply nested interface members in always block
features.description: Code should include an always block that accesses interface members through multiple levels of nested interfaces (e.g., tif3.tif4.tif5.cnt in posedge block)

features.name: module port of interface type with sub-interface access
features.description: Code should include a module that takes an interface port and accesses a sub-interface through that port (e.g., tif2.tif3.tif4.tif5.cnt in always block)
